prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document applies to England as it outlines the governance and eligibility criteria for the National Clinical Impact Awards (NCIAs) scheme, which is managed by the Advisory Committee on Clinical Impact Awards (ACCIA) specifically for the Department of Health and Social Care in England.
